name_en: General Staff of the Armed Forces of Iran
description: The General Staff of the Armed Forces (Setad-e Koll-e Niruhaye Mosallah) is the supreme military coordination body of the Islamic Republic of Iran, directly subordinate to the Supreme Leader. It coordinates both the [Artesh](/orgs/artesh) and the [IRGC](/orgs/islamic-revolutionary-guard-corps), making it the apex of the unified command structure. The Chief of Staff is appointed by and reports directly to the Supreme Leader. [Mohammad Bagheri](/people/mohammad-bagheri) served as Chief of Staff from 2016 until his death on 13 June 2025 in Israeli airstrikes on Tehran. [Gholam Ali Rashid](/people/gholam-ali-rashid) served as deputy commander and was killed in the same strike.

sources.title: General Staff of the Armed Forces (Iran) — Wikipedia
Israeli airstrikes eliminate senior Iranian military officials

editorial_notes: Directly under Supreme Leader; not under Ministry of Defense or President.
